infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: Saathi AI needs Bluetooth to connect to your Agni soil sensor device.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: Saathi AI uses Bluetooth to receive soil analysis data from Agni.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Saathi AI uses your location to tag soil test results to specific field coordinates.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Saathi AI uses the microphone for voice queries to the AI assistant.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow Saathi AI to use your location for field mapping.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Saathi AI to access your microphone for voice questions.
